edgeCases: no-JS render: .reveal hidden state gated behind html.js class only — disabled-JS path always shows full content
prefers-reduced-motion: all animations wrapped in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) — reduce users see no motion
≤360px nav overflow regression: .nav-links a.hide-sm{display:none} specificity beats tap-target rule — nav collapses on mobile
demo.gif 404: loading=lazy + explicit dimensions + background placeholder — layout stable, no JS error
absolute OG/Twitter URLs: og:image and twitter:image contain full https://samuelnp.github.io/centinela/assets/social-preview.png
exact install string: go install github.com/samuelnp/centinela@latest — no version drift
no external CDN: no <script src=http> and no <link rel=stylesheet href=http> — page self-contained
green→blue palette regression: #40a0e0 present, #3fff9f absent — neon-green not reintroduced
